case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. INES MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-29-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHARON ROUNDTREE PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, INES $1,595.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,640.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
